awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: ⛅️ Curated list of awesome Cloudflare worker recipes, open-source projects, guides, blogs and other resources.
awesomeListMeta.description: ⛅️ Curated list of awesome Cloudflare worker recipes, open-source projects, guides, blogs and other resources.

nodes.itemHTML: • Cloudflare Workers Starter Kitstars34 - - TypeScript template \w multiple CF Workers, *.env files, and local testing.
• Google reCAPTCHA verificationstars29 - Handle the server-side verification of your reCAPTCHA form.
• Th3inspectorstars1.4k - All in one CLI tool for information gathering.
• Partner Panelstars1.3k - Tool for hosting partners to provide a DNS management panel for customers.
• CFPMPstars240 - Partner management panel.
• Flaresstars171 - DNS backup tool.
• Block Bad Bot Rulesetstars164 - Collection of rulesets to block malicious crawlers with firewall rules.
• Docker DDNSstars886 - Docker image to use the free DNS Service as a dynamic DNS provider.
• Dynamic DNS Bashstars197 - Dynamic DNS updater in bash script.
• Dynamic DNS PHPstars151 - Dynamic DNS updater in PHP.
• Dynamic DNS Pythonstars150 - Dynamic DNS updater in python.
• Argo Tunnel Clientstars3.7k - CLI client for Argo tunnel, a tunneling daemon that proxies any local webserver through the Cloudflare network.
• Upperstars97 - Speeds up craft dramatically using a cache proxy in front of your webserver.
• Cloud Busterstars138 - A comprehensive pentest tool that checks sites for origin IP leaks.
• Open Source - Official open-source projects.
• API Docs - API documentation.
• Integration Resources - Plugins for content management systems, control panels, cloud providers, ecommerce platforms and more.
• Technical Resources - Technical tools and resources.
• The Serverlist Newsletter - The serverlist is a Cloudflare-curated newsletter about all things serverless.
• Official OSS Apps - Collection of official apps.
• Serverless Plugin - Plugin for serverless frameworkstars43.6k to develop and deploy serverless applications using Workers.
• GitHub Actionstars17 - Deploy a worker on push to the master branch.
• Workers KV Viewerstars37 - CLI based interactive viewer for workers KV storage.
• Redirect Management - Generate redirect worker.

• Staticstars12 - Generate a static HTML or JSON page from raw strings in your workers script.

• Pwnage Protectionstars143 - Secure password scoring and user pwnage protection api - Usage.
• URL Routerstars88 - Fast url router - Usage.

• Preact PWAstars61 - Preact progressive web app.
• Connecting to Google Storage - Pull files from Google's cloud storage.
• CSRF Protection - Protect any origin from CSRF by verifying origin/referer headers.
• URL Query Strings Parser - Parse url query strings.
• Regrex Replacement and Injection - Perform regex replacements and inject CSS/JS.
• Webpack Boilerplatestars119 - Boilerplate to build, bundle and deploy workers with webpack.

• IP lookup servicestars28 - IP lookup service using workers.
• TypeScript Workersstars139 - Types and mocks for building a tested typescript worker.
• Proxiesstars83 - Makes it easy to build workers, by providing high-level proxying primitives addressing common needs.
• Bannerostars5 - Bannero image API for simpledesktops.
• Hasurastars18 - Example using Facebook-based authorization and graphql proxy queries with hasura.
• IP Redirects - Redirect users based on their ip address.
• Short URL Redirector - Redirect short links.
• Performance Optimized Workersstars136 - Collection of worker scripts, generally focused on performance optimizations.
